response.overview: American Boy follows a young undocumented Asian American man spending a night out with his two closest friends. After overcoming his anxiety with their encouragement, he finally finds the courage to speak to the person he loves. But on what should be the best night of his life, he is suddenly detained by ICE.
response.tagline: With the looming threat of deportation. Sam, who is undocumented, is on a night out with his two friends, to finally see if he could muster up the courage to get his crush's number.
response.title: American Boy
